validations.name: input_inventory_completeness
validations.evidence: All 4 mandatory inputs present and readable. File-level SHA-256 recorded for each. No missing inputs.

validations.name: contract_version_continuity
validations.evidence: binding artifact contract_version = 43.31-v1. projection artifact contract_version = 43.31-v1. Both match.

validations.name: upstream_binding_checksum_continuity
validations.evidence: projection.upstream_binding_checksum = 71c628d1... matches authoritative file-level SHA-256 of docs/pios/43.3/validated_binding_payload.json. Provenance continuity end-to-end confirmed.

validations.name: all_binding_records_valid
validations.evidence: All 5 binding records carry validation_status = VALID. No INVALID records in validated_binding_payload.json.

validations.name: no_orphaned_projections
validations.evidence: All 5 projection records carry binding_id values present in validated_binding_payload.json. No orphan references.

validations.name: one_to_one_mapping
validations.evidence: 5 binding records → 5 projection records. Each binding_id appears exactly once in projections. No duplication.

validations.name: per_record_upstream_checksum
validations.evidence: All 5 projection records carry upstream_artifact_checksum = 71c628d1... (authoritative file-level SHA-256). No residual old values.

validations.name: projection_artifact_checksum_verified
validations.evidence: projection artifact_checksum bf20bec6... recomputed from projections array and confirmed matching stored value.

validations.name: runtime_signal_id_consistency
validations.evidence: For all 5 intake records, signal_id in projection.signal_reference matches signal_id in corresponding binding.signal_reference. No discrepancy.

validations.name: runtime_node_id_consistency
validations.evidence: For all 5 intake records, node_id in projection.node_reference matches node_id in corresponding binding.node_reference. No discrepancy.

validations.name: projection_reference_valid
validations.evidence: All 5 records carry projection_reference = '{binding_id}:VALID:43.31-v1' with correct binding_id substitution.

validations.name: attachment_status_all_attached
validations.evidence: All 5 projection records carry attachment_status = ATTACHED.

validations.name: evidence_completeness
validations.evidence: All 5 records carry all 4 evidence_reference fields: association_basis, provenance_chain, source_reference, temporal_reference. All non-null.

validations.name: no_inferred_fields
validations.evidence: Runtime intake structure contains no fields beyond those carried verbatim from upstream artifacts. No inference, repair, or synthetic construction applied.

validations.name: no_semantic_extension
validations.evidence: No new semantic fields introduced at runtime. No emphasis re-derived. No hierarchy derived. No aggregation. No enrichment.

validations.name: deterministic_processing
validations.evidence: Records processed in stable lexicographic order by attachment_id. Identical input files → identical snapshot structure and checksum 0dce38b0...

validations.name: snapshot_labeled_non_canonical
validations.evidence: runtime_intake_snapshot.json carries _label field: 'RUNTIME INTAKE SNAPSHOT — NON-CANONICAL — VALIDATION ONLY — REMOVABLE' and canonical: false.

validations.name: no_canonical_artifact_produced
validations.evidence: Stream 42.21 produces no canonical artifact. No upstream artifact modified. Only execution evidence and optional non-canonical snapshot produced.

validations.name: no_fail_closed_triggers_fired
validations.evidence: All 9 defined fail-closed conditions monitored and not triggered: missing input, checksum mismatch, orphaned attachment, broken binding linkage, contract mismatch, upstream_binding_checksum discontinuity, inference required, non-deterministic processing, ambiguous mapping.
